channel.title: Awesome Search KG
channel.description: Last 10 notes on Awesome Search KG

item.title: Doug Turnbull
item.description: Doug Turnbull Co-founder of OpenSource Connections (OSC); co-author of Relevant Search (O’Reilly).

item.title: Tiger Data
item.description: Tiger Data Database infrastructure company, formerly known as Timescale.

item.title: Learned Sparse Retrieval
item.description: Learned Sparse Retrieval Definition Learned Sparse Retrieval (LSR) is the family of neural retrieval methods that represent queries and documents as sparse vectors in vocabulary space — where weights are produced by a trained model rather than counted from term frequencies.

item.title: VectorChord
item.description: VectorChord PostgreSQL extension for high-performance vector search by TensorChord. Uses RaBitQ quantization for compressed ANN indexes.

item.title: pg_textsearch
item.description: pg_textsearch BM25 extension for PostgreSQL by Tiger Data (formerly Timescale).

item.title: pg_trgm
item.description: pg_trgm Built-in PostgreSQL extension providing trigram-based similarity matching via similarity(), word_similarity(), and GIN/GiST indexes.

item.title: pgvectorscale
item.description: pgvectorscale PostgreSQL extension by Tiger Data (formerly Timescale) that complements pgvector with a faster DiskANN-style index (StreamingDiskANN) designed for high-throughput vector search on larger corpora.

item.title: BM25
item.description: BM25 Definition BM25 (Best Match 25) is the dominant lexical retrieval algorithm — the scoring function behind Elasticsearch’s default relevance, Solr, Lucene, and most production search engines.

item.title: ParadeDB
item.description: ParadeDB Open-source PostgreSQL extension (and distribution) that brings Elasticsearch-style search to Postgres — most notably BM25 ranking, which native Postgres Full-Text Search lacks.

item.title: PostgreSQL
item.description: PostgreSQL Open-source relational database that doubles as a capable search platform.
